name: Scare BNB
overview: In Scare B&B, two couples—long-time friends since high school—are in high spirits when they arrive at a remote, rental cabin in the Tennessee woods for a much-needed vacation ... But, upon their arrival, they find the overly attentive owners may want to host them to death.

trailers.title: Double Booking Trailer - Coming to Tello FALL 2025
